name: threat-model-and-62443
description: Threat modeling and IEC 62443-4-2 evidence mapping for industrial automation products. Use when prompts mention IEC 62443, threat model, secure defaults, accounts, logging, integrity, ports, protocols or security verification.
user-invocable: false
---
# Threat Model and IEC 62443 Mapping

1. Identify assets, roles, interfaces, trust boundaries and entry points.
2. Enumerate misuse cases: unauthorized access, unsafe parameter change, denial of service, update tampering, debug port abuse.
3. Map each claimed control to evidence, not to assumptions.
4. Mark every requirement as covered, partially covered, missing evidence or failed.
5. Output gap list, residual risk, owner and retest action.
